description: Estated provides property data APIs for looking up U.S. property records by address or parcel identifiers. Its public docs note that Estated is being migrated into ATTOM Data Solutions infrastructure while existing Estated API keys remain valid.
summary: Estated exposes two documented HTTP APIs on estated.com: the Property Data API v4 and a separate Sandbox API v4, both authenticated with query-parameter API keys; no public GraphQL, MCP, CLI, or machine-readable OpenAPI spec was found.
